summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Jobflow ATS Checker with 17 bug/logic/UX fixes. Backend APIs working correctly. Frontend successfully loads and displays ATS analysis results with score ring, tabs, and interactive features. Most core functionality working as expected.

ui_bugs.issue: Derived score calculation may not match expected formula. Expected: round(42*0.55 + 49*0.45) = 45, but showing 56

integration_issues.issue: Re-run and Download buttons present but not detected by test selectors

passed_tests: Backend authentication works with session token
POST /api/ai/analyze-cv returns analysis with dual scoring (ATS: 42, Recruiter: 49, Overall: 56)
ATS page loads without crashes at /ats route
Score ring displays with overall score (56) and ATS/Recruiter badges
Tips tab has no progress bar underneath (UX15 fix verified)
Skills tab 'Missing only' filter has red count badge (UX14 fix verified)
Accept All marks all pending suggestions as accepted
Undo after Accept All reverts suggestions back to pending
Click outside resume card closes open popover (UX17 fix verified)
Compare view shows side-by-side layout with segment-based highlighting (Logic8 fix verified)
Main navigation between CV Analysis and Cover Letter tabs works
Highlighted suggestions are clickable and show popovers
Skills tab shows hard/soft skills with matched/missing indicators
Searchability tab displays items with status indicators
Tips tab shows recruiter tips with priority badges
action_item_for_main_agent: Verify derived score calculation formula: liveScore should equal round(liveAts*0.55 + liveRecruiter*0.45). Current display shows 56 but expected calculation gives 45 based on visible ATS:42 and Recruiter:49 scores.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 85% (18/21 features working, 3 minor issues with score calculation and button detection)
